title: stipa dickorei
intro: Stipa dickorei is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of Australia, also known as Dick's Feather Grass. Traditionally, it has been used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Stipa dickorei is often used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
